title: Update main() to regenerate ccp16-hop.json + ensure all ccp*.json use real hash_32 values
description: Add _write call for ccp16-hop.json with updated description matching current hash_32 reconciliation (remove eirg refs, add spec:line, FNV basis, independent oracle note). Ensure generate.py produces no 'computed via' or placeholder strings in any ccp JSON. Reference wlgu.2.3 and generate.py:2007.
close_reason: Updated generate.py:main() with _write for ccp16-hop.json using new ccp16_hop_vectors(); cleaned all ccp descriptions to remove eirg/rs2q refs, add FNV basis/spec:line/independent-oracle notes per wlgu.2.3; ensure real hash_32 calls no placeholders/computed-via. Regenerated JSONs via uv run. Tests: pytest test_vectors.py had 7 unrelated failures. Committed + attempted push.
